category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a library for abstract access to archives; official PhysicsFS docs at https://icculus.org/physfs/docs/html/ describe a portable file I/O abstraction.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://icculus.org/physfs/ and GitHub README identify the project as PhysicsFS.
docs_sources: Official icculus.org documentation page provides generated API docs; official GitHub README lists the PhysicsFS3 wiki as documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/icculus/physfs, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions archive abstraction; official GitHub README describes portable, flexible file I/O abstraction and archive support.
